case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY SHEILA B LOCKETT BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR JUL-10-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
OPPOSITION TO MTN BY REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION 301, NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED BY THE COURT -- DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY'S MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND TO SET ASIDE BAIL FORFEITURE DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY SHEILA B LOCKETT BAIL BONDS $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $108.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,108.00, TOTAL $25,108.00
